title: Triton Backend Parameters
description: Parameter schema for Triton Inference Server backend. Parameters are backend-specific and defined as map<string, ModelParameter> in model_config.proto (https://github.com/triton-inference-server/common/blob/main/protobuf/model_config.proto). All parameter values are converted to string_value in the generated config.pbtxt. Refer to Triton documentation for backend-specific parameters: https://docs.nvidia.com/deeplearning/triton-inference-server/user-guide/docs/user_guide/model_configuration.html
